nasb.text: Now as I looked at the living beings, behold, there was one wheel on the earth beside the living beings, for each of the four of them.

esv.text: Now as I looked at the living creatures, I saw a wheel on the earth beside the living creatures, one for each of the four of them.

cnv.text: 我觀看那些活物的時候，看見四個活物的旁邊都有一個觸地的輪子。

ccb.text: 当我观看这些活物的时候，发现每个活物旁边的地上都有一个轮子。
